products.name: Organic Fresh Red Apples
products.description: Fresh organic apples from the orchards of Himachal Pradesh. Crisp, juicy, and naturally sweet.
products.longDescription:
Our Organic Fresh Apples are handpicked from the pristine orchards of Himachal Pradesh, grown without harmful pesticides or chemicals. These apples are known for their exceptional sweetness, crisp texture, and vibrant red color.

Each apple is carefully selected to ensure premium quality. The apples are rich in antioxidants, dietary fiber, and essential vitamins that contribute to overall health and wellbeing.

Perfect for snacking, baking, or adding to your favorite recipes. These apples maintain their freshness for up to 10 days when stored properly in the refrigerator.

Our farmers use sustainable farming practices that protect the environment while delivering the highest quality produce to your doorstep. Experience the true taste of nature with FreshKart's organic apples.
products.nutritionalInfo: High in Vitamin C, Dietary Fiber, Antioxidants. Calories: 52 per 100g
products.storageTips: Store in refrigerator crisper drawer. Keep away from strong odors.
products.usageInstructions: Wash thoroughly before consumption. Can be eaten raw, used in salads, or cooked in desserts.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed for 3 days from delivery. If not satisfied, we offer 100% refund.

products.name: Fresh Robusta Bananas
products.description: Premium quality Robusta bananas, naturally ripened. Sweet, creamy, and energy-packed.
products.longDescription:
Our Fresh Bananas are sourced from the fertile farms of Tamil Nadu, known for producing some of India's finest Robusta bananas. These bananas are naturally ripened without any artificial chemicals, ensuring a sweet and creamy taste.

Rich in potassium, vitamin B6, and dietary fiber, these bananas are perfect for breakfast, smoothies, or as a healthy snack throughout the day. Each bunch contains 6 premium quality bananas that are carefully selected for optimal ripeness.

Our bananas are harvested at the right time and delivered to you at the perfect stage of ripeness. They're ideal for athletes, fitness enthusiasts, and anyone looking for a natural energy boost.
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in Potassium, Vitamin B6, Vitamin C. Calories: 89 per 100g
products.storageTips: Store at room temperature. Refrigerate only when fully ripe.
products.usageInstructions: Peel and eat directly. Can be sliced into cereals, used in smoothies, or baked in desserts.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for damaged bananas within 24 hours.

products.name: Fresh Orange Carrots
products.description: Farm-fresh orange carrots, crunchy and sweet. Perfect for salads and cooking.
products.longDescription:
Our Fresh Carrots are grown in the nutrient-rich soil of Punjab, known for producing some of the sweetest and most flavorful carrots in India. These carrots are harvested at peak freshness and delivered to you within 24 hours.

Rich in beta-carotene, vitamin A, and dietary fiber, these carrots support eye health, boost immunity, and promote healthy skin. They have a natural sweetness that makes them perfect for both raw consumption and cooking.

Whether you're making carrot juice, adding to salads, or cooking traditional Indian dishes, our carrots provide the perfect crunch and flavor.
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in Beta-Carotene, Vitamin A, Vitamin K, Fiber. Calories: 41 per 100g
products.storageTips: Remove greens before storing. Store in refrigerator crisper drawer.
products.usageInstructions: Wash and peel before use. Can be eaten raw, juiced, or cooked in various dishes.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed for 5 days from delivery.

products.name: Cold-Pressed Orange Juice
products.description: Cold-pressed orange juice, no added sugar. Made from fresh Nagpur oranges.
products.longDescription:
Our Cold-Pressed Orange Juice is made from the finest Nagpur oranges, known for their exceptional sweetness and rich flavor. Unlike regular juices, our cold-press method preserves all the natural nutrients, enzymes, and vitamins without using heat or added preservatives.

Each bottle contains juice from 8-10 fresh oranges, with absolutely no added sugar, water, or artificial flavors. The result is a pure, refreshing juice that tastes just like freshly squeezed oranges.

Perfect for breakfast, post-workout refreshment, or any time you need a natural vitamin C boost. Our juice is cold-pressed and bottled within hours of the oranges being harvested.
products.nutritionalInfo: High in Vitamin C, Folate, Potassium. Calories: 110 per 250ml
products.storageTips: Keep refrigerated. Shake well before use. Consume within 3 days of opening.
products.usageInstructions: Shake well before drinking. Serve chilled for best taste.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacements offered for damaged packaging.

products.name: Fresh Green Broccoli
products.description: Fresh green broccoli with tight florets. Rich in vitamins and minerals.
products.longDescription:
Our Fresh Broccoli is grown in the cool climate of Maharashtra, resulting in tight, dark green florets that are packed with nutrients. Each head is carefully selected for quality, size, and freshness.

Broccoli is a nutritional powerhouse, rich in vitamin C, vitamin K, fiber, and sulforaphane - a compound known for its cancer-fighting properties. It's low in calories but high in essential nutrients that support overall health.

Perfect for steaming, roasting, stir-frying, or adding to salads and pasta dishes. Our broccoli is delivered fresh and crisp, ready for your favorite recipes.
products.nutritionalInfo: High in Vitamin C, Vitamin K, Fiber, Folate. Calories: 34 per 100g
products.storageTips: Store unwashed in refrigerator. Wash just before use.
products.usageInstructions: Wash thoroughly. Steam for 5-7 minutes or roast at 200°C for 15 minutes.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed for 3 days from delivery.

products.name: Natural Coconut Water
products.description: Natural coconut water, no added sugar. Straight from the farms of Kerala.
products.longDescription:
Our Natural Coconut Water is sourced from young green coconuts grown in the coastal regions of Kerala. The coconuts are harvested at their peak to ensure the water is at its sweetest and most nutritious.

Packed with natural electrolytes, potassium, and antioxidants, our coconut water is the perfect natural hydration drink. It contains no added sugar, preservatives, or artificial flavors - just pure, refreshing coconut water.

Ideal for post-workout recovery, hot summer days, or any time you need a healthy, hydrating beverage. Each bottle is packed fresh and delivered to your doorstep.
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in Electrolytes, Potassium, Magnesium. Calories: 46 per 250ml
products.storageTips: Keep refrigerated. Consume within 2 days of opening.
products.usageInstructions: Shake well before drinking. Serve chilled for best taste.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacements offered for damaged packaging.

products.name: Decadent Chocolate Cake
products.description: Decadent chocolate cake with rich Belgian chocolate ganache.
products.longDescription:
Our Decadent Chocolate Cake is made with premium Belgian chocolate and the finest ingredients. Each cake is freshly baked in our hygienic kitchen and topped with a smooth, rich chocolate ganache.

The cake features three layers of moist chocolate sponge, filled and covered with dark chocolate ganache. It's then decorated with chocolate shavings for an elegant finish.

Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or any special occasion. This cake serves 4-6 people and will satisfy even the most discerning chocolate lover.
products.nutritionalInfo: Contains dairy, eggs, gluten. Calories: 450 per slice
products.storageTips: Keep refrigerated. Bring to room temperature before serving.
products.usageInstructions: Remove from refrigerator 30 minutes before serving for best taste.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacements offered for damaged cakes.

products.name: Premium Vanilla Ice Cream
products.description: Premium vanilla bean ice cream with real Madagascar vanilla.
products.longDescription:
Our Premium Vanilla Ice Cream is made using real Madagascar vanilla beans, giving it an authentic, rich vanilla flavor that artificial extracts can't match. We use fresh cream and milk from local farms to create an exceptionally smooth and creamy texture.

Unlike commercial ice creams, our product contains no artificial flavors, colors, or preservatives. You can see the tiny vanilla bean specks in every scoop, proof of its authentic quality.

Perfect on its own, paired with desserts, or as a base for milkshakes and floats. This ice cream will transport you back to the classic ice cream parlor experience.
products.nutritionalInfo: Contains dairy. Calories: 210 per 100g
products.storageTips: Store in freezer at -18°C. Do not refreeze after thawing.
products.usageInstructions: Let sit at room temperature for 5 minutes before scooping.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for freezer burn or crystallization.

products.name: Restaurant-Style Paneer Butter Masala
products.description: Restaurant-style Paneer Butter Masala with creamy tomato gravy.
products.longDescription:
Our Paneer Butter Masala recreates the authentic restaurant experience at home. The dish features soft, fresh paneer cubes simmered in a rich, creamy tomato-based gravy flavored with traditional Indian spices.

We use only the freshest ingredients - ripe tomatoes, fresh cream, pure ghee, and a secret blend of whole spices ground fresh for each batch. The paneer is made in-house from high-quality milk, ensuring it stays soft and doesn't turn rubbery.

Simply heat and serve with naan, roti, or rice for a complete meal that tastes just like your favorite restaurant's version.
products.nutritionalInfo: High in protein. Calories: 350 per serving
products.storageTips: Store in freezer. Thaw before heating.
products.usageInstructions: Thaw overnight in refrigerator. Heat in pan or microwave until hot.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for damaged packaging.

products.name: Peri-Peri Chicken Wings
products.description: Spicy peri-peri marinated chicken wings, ready to cook.
products.longDescription:
Our Peri-Peri Chicken Wings are marinated for 24 hours in our signature peri-peri sauce made with African bird's eye chilies, garlic, lemon, and a blend of secret spices. The result is intensely flavorful wings with the perfect balance of heat and tang.

The chicken comes from free-range farms, ensuring tender, juicy meat. Each wing is hand-coated with the marinade to ensure every bite is packed with flavor.

Perfect for game day, parties, or a spicy weeknight dinner. Just pop them in the oven or air fryer for crispy, delicious wings that rival your favorite restaurant's.
products.nutritionalInfo: High in protein. Calories: 280 per serving
products.storageTips: Keep refrigerated. Cook thoroughly before eating.
products.usageInstructions: Cook at 200°C for 20-25 minutes until golden brown and cooked through.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacements offered for spoiled chicken.

products.name: Fresh Strawberries
products.description: Fresh and juicy strawberries from Mahabaleshwar.
products.longDescription:
Our Fresh Strawberries are grown in the cool hills of Mahabaleshwar, famous for producing India's sweetest and most flavorful strawberries. Each berry is hand-picked at peak ripeness and carefully packed to prevent bruising.

These strawberries are deep red in color, firm to the touch, and bursting with sweet, tangy flavor. They're perfect for eating fresh, adding to desserts, making jams, or blending into smoothies.

Rich in vitamin C and antioxidants, these berries are as healthy as they are delicious. Enjoy them while they're in season!
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in Vitamin C, Manganese, Folate. Calories: 32 per 100g
products.storageTips: Store in refrigerator. Wash just before eating.
products.usageInstructions: Rinse gently under cold water before eating. Remove stems.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed for 2 days from delivery.

products.name: Organic Spinach Leaves
products.description: Fresh organic spinach leaves, grown without pesticides.
products.longDescription:
Our Organic Spinach is grown in the pristine valleys of Uttarakhand using traditional farming methods without any chemical pesticides or fertilizers. The leaves are tender, dark green, and packed with nutrients.

Spinach is one of the most nutrient-dense leafy greens, rich in iron, vitamin K, vitamin A, and folate. It's also a good source of antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress.

Perfect for salads, smoothies, saag, or lightly sautéed as a side dish. Our spinach is harvested early morning and delivered fresh to your doorstep.
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in Iron, Vitamin K, Vitamin A, Folate. Calories: 23 per 100g
products.storageTips: Store in refrigerator. Wash just before use.
products.usageInstructions: Wash thoroughly in cold water. Can be eaten raw or cooked.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed for 2 days from delivery.

products.name: Almond Milk - Unsweetened
products.description: Creamy almond milk, dairy-free and unsweetened.
products.longDescription:
Our Unsweetened Almond Milk is made from premium California almonds and filtered water. Unlike many commercial almond milks, our version contains no added sugars, thickeners, or artificial ingredients.

Each batch is made by blending soaked almonds with water, then straining to create a smooth, creamy milk that's perfect for those avoiding dairy. It's naturally low in calories while providing vitamin E and healthy fats.

Use it in coffee, smoothies, cereal, or baking as a 1:1 replacement for dairy milk. It's vegan, lactose-free, and suitable for those with dairy allergies.
products.nutritionalInfo: Low in calories, Rich in Vitamin E. Calories: 30 per 250ml
products.storageTips: Shake well before use. Keep refrigerated.
products.usageInstructions: Shake well before each use. Refrigerate after opening.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for spoiled product.

products.name: Greek Yogurt - Plain
products.description: Thick and creamy Greek yogurt, strained for extra protein.
products.longDescription:
Our Greek Yogurt is made using traditional straining methods that remove whey, resulting in a thicker, creamier texture with almost double the protein of regular yogurt. We use milk from grass-fed cows and live active cultures.

Unlike many commercial Greek yogurts, our version contains no added thickeners, gelatin, or artificial ingredients. It's simply milk and live cultures, strained to perfection.

Perfect for breakfast with fruit and honey, as a sour cream substitute, or in smoothies and dips. It's naturally high in protein and probiotics that support digestive health.
products.nutritionalInfo: High in Protein, Calcium, Probiotics. Calories: 150 per serving
products.storageTips: Keep refrigerated. Consume within 5 days of opening.
products.usageInstructions: Enjoy as is or use in recipes. Stir before use.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacements offered for spoiled product.

products.name: Multigrain Bread
products.description: Healthy multigrain bread made with 7 different grains.
products.longDescription:
Our Multigrain Bread is made with a blend of seven nutritious grains and seeds - whole wheat, oats, barley, millet, flax seeds, sunflower seeds, and sesame seeds. Each loaf is freshly baked using traditional sourdough methods, without any preservatives or artificial additives.

The combination of grains gives this bread a nutty flavor, hearty texture, and excellent nutritional profile. It's high in fiber, protein, and essential minerals.

Perfect for sandwiches, toast, or alongside soups and salads. This bread stays fresh longer thanks to the natural preservative properties of sourdough fermentation.
products.nutritionalInfo: High in Fiber, Protein. Calories: 120 per slice
products.storageTips: Store in cool dry place. Can be frozen for up to 3 months.
products.usageInstructions: Store at room temperature. Toast for best flavor.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed for 3 days from delivery.

products.name: Free-Range Eggs
products.description: Free-range eggs from happy hens raised on pasture.
products.longDescription:
Our Free-Range Eggs come from hens that are raised humanely with access to outdoor pastures. They're free to roam, forage for insects and plants, and engage in natural behaviors. This results in eggs with darker yolks, richer flavor, and superior nutrition compared to conventional eggs.

Studies show that eggs from pasture-raised hens contain higher levels of omega-3 fatty acids, vitamin E, and beta-carotene. The hens are never given antibiotics or hormones.

Perfect for breakfast, baking, or any recipe that calls for eggs. Once you try these eggs, you'll taste the difference.
products.nutritionalInfo: High in Protein, Omega-3, Vitamin D. Calories: 70 per egg
products.storageTips: Keep refrigerated. Store pointy end down.
products.usageInstructions: Refrigerate immediately. Use within 3 weeks for best quality.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacements offered for cracked eggs.

products.name: Aged Basmati Rice
products.description: Premium aged Basmati rice, known for its long grains and aroma.
products.longDescription:
Our Aged Basmati Rice is sourced from the foothills of the Himalayas, where the unique climate and soil conditions produce the world's finest basmati. The rice is aged for 2 years, which enhances its aroma, flavor, and allows the grains to cook up separate and fluffy.

Each grain is extra-long (over 8mm before cooking) and expands to nearly double in length when cooked. The rice has a distinct nutty flavor and floral aroma that's characteristic of true basmati.

Perfect for biryani, pulao, or as an everyday rice with dal or curry. This rice is gluten-free and suitable for all rice-based dishes.
products.nutritionalInfo: Good source of carbohydrates. Calories: 150 per cooked cup
products.storageTips: Store in airtight container in cool, dry place.
products.usageInstructions: Rinse until water runs clear. Soak for 20 minutes before cooking.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for insect infestation.

products.name: Raw Organic Honey
products.description: Raw, unfiltered organic honey from wildflowers.
products.longDescription:
Our Raw Organic Honey is harvested from beehives located in pristine forest areas of West Bengal, far from agricultural pesticides. The bees forage on a variety of wildflowers, resulting in honey with a complex, floral flavor that changes with the seasons.

Unlike commercial honey, our honey is never heated or ultra-filtered, which preserves the natural enzymes, pollen, and beneficial compounds. It may crystallize over time - this is a sign of raw, unprocessed honey.

Perfect as a natural sweetener in tea, on toast, or used in traditional remedies. It's also wonderful drizzled over yogurt or fruit.
products.nutritionalInfo: Natural sugars, enzymes. Calories: 60 per tablespoon
products.storageTips: Store at room temperature. Do not refrigerate.
products.usageInstructions: If crystallized, place jar in warm water to liquefy.
products.warrantyInfo: Pure honey guaranteed. Replacements offered for adulteration.

products.name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil
products.description: Premium extra virgin olive oil from Spain.
products.longDescription:
Our Extra Virgin Olive Oil is cold-extracted from Arbequina olives grown in the Andalusia region of Spain. The olives are hand-picked and pressed within hours of harvesting to ensure the highest quality and lowest acidity (under 0.5%).

This oil has a fruity, slightly peppery flavor with notes of fresh grass and green tomato. It's rich in polyphenols and healthy monounsaturated fats that support heart health.

Perfect for salads, dipping bread, drizzling over finished dishes, or for low-heat cooking. Not recommended for deep frying due to its low smoke point.
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in Monounsaturated Fats, Vitamin E. Calories: 120 per tablespoon
products.storageTips: Store in cool, dark place away from heat and light.
products.usageInstructions: Use raw for best flavor. Can be used for sautéing at medium heat.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for rancid oil.

products.name: Italian Pasta - Penne
products.description: Authentic Italian pasta made from durum wheat semolina.
products.longDescription:
Our Italian Pasta is made from 100% durum wheat semolina, the highest quality wheat for pasta making. It's extruded through bronze dies, which gives the pasta a rough, porous texture that helps sauce adhere better.

The pasta is slow-dried at low temperatures to preserve the wheat's flavor and nutritional value. The result is pasta with superior taste, texture, and cooking qualities.

Penne is a versatile shape that works well with chunky sauces, baked dishes, or cold pasta salads. Cooks to a perfect al dente texture in 10-11 minutes.
products.nutritionalInfo: Good source of carbohydrates, protein. Calories: 200 per serving
products.storageTips: Store in cool, dry place in airtight container.
products.usageInstructions: Boil in salted water for 10-11 minutes. Drain and serve with sauce.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for insect infestation.

products.name: Alphonso Mangoes
products.description: Sweet and juicy Alphonso mangoes - the king of mangoes.
products.longDescription:
Our Alphonso Mangoes are sourced from the Ratnagiri region of Maharashtra, famous for producing the world's finest mangoes. These mangoes are known for their vibrant golden-yellow color, creamy texture, and exceptionally sweet, aromatic flavor with hints of honey and citrus.

Each mango is tree-ripened and hand-picked at peak maturity. We pack them carefully to prevent bruising and deliver them at the perfect stage of ripeness.

Enjoy them fresh, in smoothies, or as a decadent dessert. The season is short, so don't miss out on these prized fruits!
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in Vitamin A, Vitamin C. Calories: 135 per mango
products.storageTips: Store at room temperature. Refrigerate only when fully ripe.
products.usageInstructions: Rinse before eating. Can be eaten fresh or used in desserts.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for damaged mangoes.

products.name: Tomato Ketchup
products.description: Premium tomato ketchup made from ripe tomatoes.
products.longDescription:
Our Tomato Ketchup is made using vine-ripened tomatoes, pure cane sugar, and a secret blend of spices. Unlike mass-produced ketchups, our version contains no high-fructose corn syrup, artificial colors, or preservatives.

The result is a ketchup with deep tomato flavor, the perfect balance of sweet and tangy, and a rich red color that comes naturally from the tomatoes.

Perfect with fries, burgers, sandwiches, or as a base for barbecue sauces and marinades. Once you try this ketchup, you'll never go back to the commercial brands.
products.nutritionalInfo: Contains sugar. Calories: 20 per tablespoon
products.storageTips: Store in cool place. Refrigerate after opening.
products.usageInstructions: Shake well before use. Refrigerate after opening.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for damaged packaging.

products.name: Butter Chicken
products.description: Restaurant-style Butter Chicken with creamy tomato gravy.
products.longDescription:
Our Butter Chicken recreates the iconic dish from Delhi's legendary restaurants. Tender, tandoori-marinated chicken pieces are simmered in a rich, creamy tomato gravy flavored with butter, cream, and aromatic spices.

The chicken is marinated for 24 hours in yogurt and spices, then grilled before being added to the gravy - this two-step process creates layers of flavor you won't find in ordinary frozen meals.

Simply heat and serve with naan or rice for a restaurant-quality meal at home. Contains no preservatives or artificial colors.
products.nutritionalInfo: High in protein. Calories: 380 per serving
products.storageTips: Store in freezer. Thaw before heating.
products.usageInstructions: Thaw overnight in refrigerator. Heat in pan until hot.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for damaged packaging.

products.name: Pizza Base - 2 pcs
products.description: Soft and crispy pizza base, ready to top and bake.
products.longDescription:
Our Pizza Bases are made using a traditional Italian recipe with just flour, water, yeast, salt, and a touch of olive oil. The dough is cold-fermented for 48 hours, which develops flavor and creates the perfect texture - crispy on the outside, chewy on the inside.

Each base is par-baked, so you just need to add your favorite toppings and finish baking at home. This ensures a fresh, crispy crust every time.

Perfect for homemade pizza night. Each pack contains 2 medium-sized bases (8 inches each). Free from preservatives and artificial additives.
products.nutritionalInfo: Good source of carbohydrates. Calories: 200 per base
products.storageTips: Store in cool place. Can be frozen for up to 3 months.
products.usageInstructions: Add toppings and bake at 220°C for 8-10 minutes.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed for 5 days from delivery.

products.name: Green Tea - Premium
products.description: Premium green tea leaves from Darjeeling.
products.longDescription:
Our Premium Green Tea is sourced from high-altitude tea gardens in Darjeeling, where the cool climate and morning mist produce tea leaves with exceptional flavor and aroma. The leaves are hand-plucked and quickly steamed to preserve their green color and delicate flavor.

This green tea has a light, vegetal flavor with notes of grass and a hint of sweetness. It's naturally rich in antioxidants, particularly EGCG, which is known for its health benefits.

Perfect for morning or afternoon, hot or iced. Contains no artificial flavors or additives - just pure, high-quality tea leaves.
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in antioxidants, low caffeine. Calories: 0 per cup
products.storageTips: Store in airtight container away from light, heat, and moisture.
products.usageInstructions: Steep in 80°C water for 2-3 minutes. Do not use boiling water.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for stale tea.

products.name: Dark Chocolate - 70% Cocoa
products.description: Premium dark chocolate with 70% cocoa content.
products.longDescription:
Our Dark Chocolate is made from ethically-sourced cacao beans from Ghana and the Dominican Republic. The beans are slow-roasted and stone-ground to create a smooth, complex chocolate with notes of dried fruit, coffee, and a hint of spice.

With 70% cocoa content, this chocolate strikes the perfect balance between intense dark chocolate flavor and approachable sweetness. It's naturally rich in antioxidants and flavonoids.

Perfect for snacking, baking, or pairing with wine and cheese. Contains no artificial flavors, soy lecithin, or palm oil.
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in antioxidants, iron. Calories: 170 per 40g serving
products.storageTips: Store in cool, dry place between 14-18°C.
products.usageInstructions: Store at room temperature. Allow to temper before serving.
products.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacements offered for bloom or melting.

products.name: Potato Chips - Classic Salted
products.description: Crispy potato chips made from farm-fresh potatoes.
products.longDescription:
Our Classic Salted Potato Chips are made from premium potatoes grown in Gujarat. The potatoes are sliced paper-thin, kettle-cooked in small batches, and lightly salted with sea salt.

The kettle-cooking method gives these chips a satisfying crunch and rustic appearance. Unlike mass-produced chips, our version contains no artificial flavors, preservatives, or MSG.

Perfect for snacking, parties, or packing in lunch boxes. These chips are made fresh weekly and have a short shelf life - a sign of their freshness.
products.nutritionalInfo: Contains potato, salt, oil. Calories: 280 per 50g pack
products.storageTips: Store in cool dry place. Seal tightly after opening.
products.usageInstructions: Enjoy straight from the pack. Best consumed within 3 days of opening.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacements offered for stale chips.

products.name: Cheese Slices - Processed
products.description: Processed cheese slices, perfect for sandwiches and burgers.
products.longDescription:
Our Cheese Slices are made from real cheddar cheese blended with milk solids to create a smooth, meltable cheese that's perfect for hot sandwiches, burgers, and toasties. Each slice is individually wrapped for convenience.

The cheese has a mild, creamy flavor that appeals to both kids and adults. It melts beautifully without becoming greasy or separating.

Perfect for school lunches, quick snacks, or adding to your favorite recipes. Contains no artificial colors or preservatives.
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in calcium, protein. Calories: 70 per slice
products.storageTips: Keep refrigerated. Consume within 7 days of opening.
products.usageInstructions: Remove from refrigerator 5 minutes before use.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacements offered for spoiled cheese.

products.name: Salted Butter
products.description: Creamy salted butter made from fresh cream.
products.longDescription:
Our Salted Butter is churned from fresh cream sourced from grass-fed cows in Punjab. The cream is cultured for 24 hours before churning, which develops a subtle tang and richer flavor.

The butter is lightly salted with sea salt, which enhances its flavor and acts as a natural preservative. It has a smooth, spreadable texture and a rich, creamy taste.

Perfect for spreading on toast, baking, or adding to sauces and vegetables. Contains no artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives.
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in fat-soluble vitamins. Calories: 100 per tablespoon
products.storageTips: Keep refrigerated. Can be frozen for up to 6 months.
products.usageInstructions: Remove from refrigerator 15 minutes before use for easy spreading.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacements offered for rancid butter.

products.name: Mixed Fruit Juice
products.description: Mixed fruit juice blend with no added sugar.
products.longDescription:
Our Mixed Fruit Juice is a delicious blend of apple, orange, pineapple, and mango juices, with a hint of passion fruit. The fruits are cold-pressed and blended to create a complex, tropical flavor profile.

Unlike many commercial juices, our version contains no added sugar, water, or artificial flavors. It's simply juice from real fruits, pasteurized to ensure food safety while preserving flavor.

Perfect for breakfast, lunchboxes, or as a healthier alternative to soda. Rich in vitamins and antioxidants from multiple fruit sources.
products.nutritionalInfo: Rich in vitamins. Calories: 110 per 250ml
products.storageTips: Keep refrigerated. Shake well before use.
products.usageInstructions: Shake well before serving. Serve chilled.
products.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacements offered for spoiled juice.

subscriptionPlans.name: Basic Saver
subscriptionPlans.description: Perfect for singles and small families.

subscriptionPlans.name: Daily Milk Subscription
subscriptionPlans.description: Daily fresh milk delivered to your doorstep every morning.
subscriptionPlans.longDescription:
Get fresh, pasteurized milk delivered daily to your doorstep. Our milk comes from local farms and is processed within 6 hours of milking. Never run out of milk again with our reliable subscription service.

Plan includes: 1 liter of fresh milk delivered daily for 30 days. You can pause, cancel, or modify your subscription anytime.
subscriptionPlans.nutritionalInfo: Rich in Calcium, Vitamin D, Protein
subscriptionPlans.usageInstructions: Refrigerate immediately upon delivery. Shake well before use.
subscriptionPlans.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Free replacement for any quality issues.

subscriptionPlans.name: Fresh Fruit Box Subscription
subscriptionPlans.description: Weekly curated fruit box with 7+ seasonal fruits.
subscriptionPlans.longDescription:
Enjoy a variety of fresh, seasonal fruits delivered to your doorstep every week. Our fruit boxes are curated by nutritionists to ensure a balanced mix of vitamins and minerals.

Each box contains 7-10 different fruits including apples, bananas, oranges, seasonal specials, and exotic fruits. Perfect for families who want to eat healthy without the hassle of weekly shopping.
subscriptionPlans.storageTips: Store fruits at room temperature or refrigerate as appropriate
subscriptionPlans.usageInstructions: Wash fruits before consumption. Some fruits may need ripening at room temperature.
subscriptionPlans.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacement for any damaged fruits.

subscriptionPlans.name: Organic Vegetable Subscription
subscriptionPlans.longDescription:
Get a box of fresh, certified organic vegetables delivered to your doorstep every week. All vegetables are grown without pesticides or chemical fertilizers.

Each box contains 8-12 seasonal vegetables including leafy greens, root vegetables, and exotic varieties. Perfect for health-conscious families who value organic produce.
subscriptionPlans.storageTips: Store vegetables in refrigerator crisper drawer
subscriptionPlans.usageInstructions: Wash thoroughly before consumption. Store in refrigerator.
subscriptionPlans.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacement for any spoiled vegetables.

subscriptionPlans.name: Healthy Meal Plan Subscription
subscriptionPlans.longDescription:
Get nutritious, balanced meals prepared by professional chefs delivered to your doorstep daily. Choose from vegetarian or non-vegetarian options.

Each day includes breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Meals are calorie-counted and nutritionist-approved. Perfect for busy professionals who want to eat healthy without cooking.
subscriptionPlans.usageInstructions: Heat in microwave for 2 minutes or oven for 10 minutes.
subscriptionPlans.warrantyInfo: Satisfaction guaranteed. Free replacement for any quality issues.

subscriptionPlans.name: Fresh Juice Subscription
subscriptionPlans.longDescription:
Get a variety of fresh, cold-pressed juices delivered to your doorstep every week. Our juices are made from organic fruits and vegetables, with no added sugar or preservatives.

Each week includes 7 bottles of assorted juices - orange, apple, carrot-beetroot, green detox, and seasonal specials. Perfect for detox, health enthusiasts, and anyone wanting a nutritional boost.
subscriptionPlans.usageInstructions: Shake well before drinking. Consume within 3 days of delivery.
subscriptionPlans.warrantyInfo: Freshness guaranteed. Replacement for any spoiled juice.

subscriptionPlans.name: Grocery Essentials Subscription
subscriptionPlans.description: Monthly grocery box with daily essentials.
subscriptionPlans.longDescription:
Never run out of daily essentials with our monthly grocery subscription. Get rice, dal, oil, spices, and other staples delivered to your doorstep every month.

Each box includes 15-20 essential grocery items customized based on your family's consumption patterns. Perfect for busy families who want to avoid last-minute grocery runs.
subscriptionPlans.usageInstructions: Store items in airtight containers after opening.
subscriptionPlans.warrantyInfo: Quality guaranteed. Replacement for any damaged items.
